title: DOMESTIC VIOLENCE AND SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES - 211info
text: SHELTER FROM THE STORM DOMESTIC VIOLENCE AND SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a crisis line and emergency shelter. Advocacy includes information and referral, assistance with restraining orders, reporting options, counseling and support groups, and other supportive services. 10901 Island Avenue Island City, OR 97850 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence or sexual assault and their families and supporters Hours: Crisis Line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Office Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 963-7226 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-7226 Crisis Line (541) 963-9261 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters Domestic Violence Support Groups Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHELTER FROM THE STORM
